skill_availability_goal: Verify that debugger aligns expected behavior against 4-level PRD/TRD feature_path documents before repair planning.
prompt: 用户说：Message History Search 的搜索结果排序不对，这是 bug，请修一下。相关预期文档在 docs/pm/chat-interface/messages/history/search/PRD.md 和 docs/engineer/chat-interface/messages/history/search/TRD.md。请先按 debugger 流程处理，不要直接修复。
